sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, i.q. נָדַד to flee, to go away (Syr. and Samar. id.).

Piel נִדָּה to remove, followed by לְ Amo 6:3 to cast out, to exclude, Isa 66:5 compare נָדַד No.4. (In the Rabbinic נִדּוּי is excommunication, separation from the congregation.)

II.

נדה

an unused root, i.q. נָדַב No. 2. to give freely, to be liberal (Arab. ندا to be moist, liberal), hence נָדָן and-
